jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Snapdeal - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Snapdeal. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Marketplace Manager to strengthen our Raipur-based team.

About Snapdeal:
Snapdeal is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Snapdeal!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
